group_1.narration: Among Magical Girls,@there is no "East" or "West".@Everyone is equal.

group_1.textCenter: Kanagi wasn't wrong when she told me that.
In fact, those words were what saved me.
But in the end, it only let me briefly escape@from reality.
I've just been turning a blind eye...
Before I became a Magical Girl, I was an ordinary@human being...
And thus, I've always been forced to live as one...
No matter how hard I try, society will always edge@its way into my field of vision.

group_1.textRight: Which is why I have to...!

group_1.textLeft: I take it you hold a grudge against Kamihama@as a whole, regardless of East or West?
Then— then you should come along with us!
And follow Magical Girl supremacy!
Indeed. I was expecting some treachery due to the@situation in the East,
but if it's equality and revenge against humans that@you're after, we can give you that as well.

group_1.textRight: Am I supposed to just trust you?

group_1.textLeft: Would you care to hear the details?
But— but...@She might regret it, you know...?
She'll see things our way once she hears us@all the way out.

group_1.textRight: Since I'm going to have regrets either way...
I'd rather let my emotions take over@so I don't waste any time.

group_1.textLeft: Alright, that works for me.
Let's discuss it later once the other girls@have joined up, though.
This is hardly the place for such a conversation.
We'll let you know when and where.

group_1.textCenter: I take it you're going to join the Neo-Magius, then?

group_1.textLeft: I'm not quite sure yet~.

group_1.textRight: I received an invitation myself,@but I'm still undecided.

group_1.textLeft: You had some sympathy for me when you looked@into my mind earlier, right?

group_1.textRight: In terms of equality and exploitation...

group_1.textLeft: How's Kamihama doing now? The people in the@East seem to be having a hard time.

group_1.textRight: As Magical Girls, we may be equals, but at the end@of the day, we're still members of society.
The rift between us and the West is apparent@in our everyday lives.
Our age-old history gets in the way whenever@we attempt to bridge the gap,
no matter how hard we try to change@or what steps we try to take.
It's unbearable to watch the situation continue@to take turns for the worse.

group_1.textLeft: Then why don't you ask them about it?@The Neo-Magius, I mean.
If we spread Magical Girl supremacy, we can make@everyone in Kamihama equal.
Even among Magical Girls, we won't be exploited@anymore once we make it to the top.
You should join me in becoming a warden@of peace and equality!
It'll be an Easy Game if we all work together!
Anyway, the Neo-Magius is gonna give us@the full scoop next time.
It's a bit of a hike, but you'll be there too,@right, Kanagi?

group_1.textRight: (Yakumo will probably find out that@the Neo-Magius is still active)
(And when she does, she will undoubtedly@join them...)
I see your point.@I'll attend the meeting as well.
